positive: A minimalist and whimsical illustration of a starry nocturnal forest landscape. The scene features stylized, silhouetted trees with glowing, bioluminescent moss and toadstools, arranged symmetrically around a clear central path. Above, the sky is a deep indigo gradient, filled with constellations and abstract celestial patterns rendered in soft gradients of sapphire, emerald, and gold. The overall aesthetic should be elegant, high-contrast, and suitable for screen printing on fabric. Composition must be central and circular, with negative space effectively framing the main subjects. Vector art quality, crisp lines, engraved style, limited palette, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, deformed, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, artifacts, poor anatomy, ugly, grain, noisy, jpeg artifacts, gradient noise
